react.summary: React is an open-source JavaScript library used to build fast and interactive user interfaces.

java.summary: Java is a powerful object-oriented programming language used for web, mobile and enterprise applications.

python.summary: Python is an easy-to-learn programming language widely used in AI, Machine Learning, Data Science and Web Development.

nodejs.summary: Node.js allows JavaScript to run on the server for building scalable backend applications.

docker.summary: Docker is a containerization platform used to package and deploy applications consistently.
